column1: # Thalassemia truth table — alpha and beta globin
# Consumed by tests/test_thal_truth_table.py. Unlike smn_truth_table.tsv (which
# nothing reads, and which the plan flags as a warning), every row here is
# cross-checked against the committed panels, so a coordinate that drifts out of
# assets/ fails the suite instead of rotting silently.
# ==================== READ THIS BEFORE USING IT AS TRUTH ====================
# NOTHING HERE IS ORTHOGONALLY CONFIRMED. Every genotype was derived from the
# same reads or VCFs a caller would be validated against, so agreement measures
# self-consistency, not accuracy. The `orthogonal` column is `no` on every row
# and must stay that way until a gap-PCR / MLPA / Sanger result arrives.
# Treat concordance against this table as a regression check, not as sensitivity.
# THAL1/THAL2 SAMPLE LABELS ARE REVERSED vs what the supplier described. The
# genotypes below follow the SEQUENCE, not the filename. Unresolved with the
# supplier as of 2026-07-22 — see the plan's "Sample identity" section.
# columns
#   sample       sample id as it appears in the BAM/VCF filename
#   locus        alpha | beta
#   genotype     allele string. "|" INSIDE an allele = depth-degenerate group
#                that this evidence cannot resolve (e.g. --SEA|--MED)
#   alpha_genes  functional alpha-gene count 0-4, or NA for beta rows
#   zygosity     het | hom | compound_het | none
#   panel_ref    allele name or HGVS that MUST exist in the assets/ panel, or "-"
#   method       how the genotype was established
#   evidence     the actual measurement, so a reader can re-check it
#   orthogonal   independent-assay confirmation: yes | no
#   confidence   high | medium | low
#   note
sample
THAL1
column8: segment scores HBZ 1.13 intact, HBA2 0.49, INTER_A2_A1 0.50, HBA1 0.41 het loss; junction chr16:165396-184701 size 19304, 7 right-clip + 5 left-clip reads, 10 size-matched discordant fragments (inserts 19575-19858 vs 450+19304 expected), 9 reference-spanning reads = het
column11: Spares HBZ so --FIL/--THAI excluded. --SEA vs --MED STILL NOT RESOLVED and the junction does not resolve it: the breakpoint is now measured, but no GRCh38 breakpoint coordinates exist for either allele to compare it against (hba_deletion_alleles.tsv carries none, by design), so 19304 bp excludes neither. Supplier described this material as --SEA; that is a label, not a measurement. Junction coordinates derived twice independently 2026-07-22 and agreed to the base.

column1: THAL1
column8: chr11:5225923 G>A GT=0/1 AD=9,10 VAF 0.53 (hc4 GATK VCF)
column11: Common Chinese beta+ allele. Depth 19 is modest and the variant is intronic (pathogenic via cryptic splicing). THAL1 is therefore a DOUBLE heterozygote, alpha and beta - not described at purchase.

column1: THAL2
column8: chr16:173548 T>C pileup DP=22 ref 10 / alt 12 VAF 0.545 (samtools mpileup -Q13 -q1); VCF GT=0/1 QUAL=330 AD=12,13
column11: No deletion: every diagnostic segment at ratio ~1.00. Zygosity is simple here ONLY because the alpha-gene count is 4; on a deletion background the same VAF would mean something different. DP CORRECTED 2026-07-22: this row read DP=23, which is not reproducible at any -Q/-q setting (sweep gives 25 at -Q0, 22 at -Q13, 20 at -Q20, 17 at -Q25) and was internally inconsistent with its own VAF (12/23=0.52, not 0.55). THAL1 at the same site: DP=17, 0 alt.

column1: THAL2
column8: no panel allele found in HBB
column11: Absence of a panel hit is NOT a negative - the panel is 12 curated alleles of ~280 known. Recorded to document what was checked.

column8: HbE chr11:5226943 DP=23 C=10 T=13; CD41-42 chr11:5226762 DP=26 12 del events; 4/4 informative fragments place them in TRANS
column11: 1000G CDX. Compound het = clinically HbE/beta-0, but PHENOTYPE IS UNKNOWN - 1000G subjects are nominally healthy and HbE/beta-0 severity varies. Do NOT record as affected. Phasing rests on 4 fragments across a 181 bp gap.

column8: see above; second allele of the same compound genotype
column11: Recorded as its own row so a per-allele concordance check sees both.
CDX, unrelated. Truth is another caller's output - circular if used to measure accuracy of a caller, acceptable as a regression fixture. HBB is not in a segdup so the call is reliable.

column1: # DELIBERATELY ABSENT: GIAB HG001-HG007 are NOT recorded as alpha-negative.
# Their alpha status is unknown - the pipeline has never produced a chr16 call
# below 14.6 Mb, which is evidence of the caller's blindness, not of their
# genotype. Recording them as negative would repeat the exact false-negative
# this project exists to fix.
# NOT REPRESENTED, so sensitivity for these is UNMEASURED at launch:
#   alpha  -a3.7 (commonest worldwide), -a4.2, --FIL, --THAI, anti-3.7 triplication,
#          Hb Constant Spring, Hb Adana, and any compound het on a deletion background
#   beta   ~270 of ~280 known alleles; no beta-only positive outside 1000G
